import io
import string
import list

fn insert_unique(_ xs: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(xs, v)
    xs
  else
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    for x in xs
      if not inserted and v < x
        result = list.push(result, v)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, x)
    end
    if not inserted
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    result
  end
end

fn parse_line(_ s: String, _ acc: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result = acc
  mut cur = ""
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = false
    if i == n
      is_ws = true
    else
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
          is_ws = true
        end
      when None
        is_ws = true
      end
    end
    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          result = insert_unique(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut acc: List<Int> = []
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    acc = parse_line(line, acc)
  when None
    ()
  end
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    acc = parse_line(line, acc)
  when None
    ()
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in acc
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
